title: Add an existing field to a condition
excerpt: When adding a condition to a field in a form, you only have the option to add a new field.  However, I have several forms that I would like to redesign to have some existing fields be displayed only in certain conditions…

posts.author: MBBV (Matt Baker)
posts.cookedHtml: When adding a condition to a field in a form, you only have the option to add a new field. However, I have several forms that I would like to redesign to have some existing fields be displayed only in certain conditions. Therefore, it would be very helpful to be able to add an existing field to a condition.
